creator: bennett@sdf.org
text: I can't easily confirm this at this point, but my recollection is that this UPDATING entry was not present as of r347183.  In any case, I do remember looking carefully at /boot/loader and /boot/zfsloader* on r347183 after crahman's instructions allowed me to complete a boot into that revision.  loader and zfsloader were distinct, executable binaries, each with its own, distinct inode number.  If that is not what I should have seen at that revision, then installworld didn't take care of it.
